message:
docs: add comprehensive web platform plan for NTM

Add detailed plan document for REST API, WebSocket, and web UI layers.
The plan covers:
- Complete Agent Flywheel integration (8 tools)
- REST API with 70+ endpoints mirroring all CLI commands
- WebSocket layer with 12 real-time channels
- Next.js 16 / React 19 web UI architecture
- Desktop and mobile UX strategies
- UI components for all flywheel tools
- 6-phase implementation roadmap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
